text_en: For me, how I spend my morning determines the mood for the rest of my day. My routine begins at 6:30 AM when the soft sunlight filters through my window. Instead of checking my phone immediately, I prefer to take a few deep breaths to feel refreshed. After stretching, I head to the kitchen to brew a hot cup of coffee; the rich aroma always helps me wake up properly. While sipping my drink, I usually spend fifteen minutes journaling or planning my goals. This quiet time is essential for my mental clarity. After that, I have a light breakfast, usually some fruit or toast, before getting ready for work. These simple yet consistent habits help me feel organized and energized. A peaceful morning is truly the best gift I can give myself before the "hustle and bustle" of the city begins.
